title: Vežba 64

questions.text: Koja rečenica koristi since u trenutku Present Perfect Continuous sa preciznošću?

answers.answer: I have worked on the project since last week.
answers.feedback: Ovo je vreme za Present Perfect Simple. Glagolski oblik treba biti u vremenu Present Perfect Continuous (have been working) da pokaže tekuću radnju.

answers.answer: I was testing the program since yesterday.
answers.feedback: Ovo je vreme za Past Simple. Kada je Present Perfect Continuous, treba da koristi have been umesto was.

answers.answer: I have been testing them since the latest software update.
I will have been working on the project since next month.
answers.feedback: Vreme za Future Perfect nije kompatibilno ovde; since se koristi zajedno sa vremenom Present Perfect Continuous.

instructions: Ovaj zadatak nema zvuk. Pročitajte pitanje ispod i izaberite tačan odgovor.
explanation: Since koristi se u trenutku Present Perfect Continuous da pokaže početak akcije koja je još u toku.
